threats.description: SEO poisoning lure domain impersonating OBS Studio. Part of same AsyncRAT campaign using tokenized delivery URLs to bypass URL-based blocking. Poisons both traditional search and AI agent search results

SEO poisoning lure domain impersonating OBS Studio. Uses custom download-link.js component to orchestrate token-based payload delivery, Bing/Yandex verification tokens, and Chinese-language keywords. Part of coordinated AsyncRAT distribution campaign active since October 2025.
